---
title: "Descriptive Statistics — Table 1"
author: "Dan Rzewnicki"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

## 1. Load packages

```{r packages}
required_packages <- c("tidyverse", "here", "tableone", "knitr")

installed <- rownames(installed.packages())
to_install <- setdiff(required_packages, installed)
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(tableone)
library(knitr)
```

---

## 2. Load data

```{r load-data}
df_analysis <- readRDS(here("data", "analysis_dataset.rds"))

cat("Dimensions:", nrow(df_analysis), "rows ×", ncol(df_analysis), "columns\n")
```

---

## 3. Define variables

```{r define-vars}
# All variables to include in Table 1
myVars <- c(
  "trt_group",
  "vancomycin_day0",
  "received_vancomycin_14",
  "age",
  "bmi",
  "baseline_sofa",
  "daysaccurate_timezero_firstanyantibiotics",
  "CHARLSON",
  "sex",
  "race.eth",
  "baseline_vent",
  "prevalent_aki.factor",
  "sepsis",
  "source_of_infection",
  "baseline_anyvasopressor",
  "inhosp_mortality28",
  "MAKE14",
  "comagdelcfreedays14",
  "baseline_coma_delirium",
  "baseline_neutropenia"
)

# Categorical variables — will be summarized as n (%)
catVars <- c(
  "trt_group",
  "vancomycin_day0",
  "received_vancomycin_14",
  "sex",
  "race.eth",
  "baseline_vent",
  "prevalent_aki.factor",
  "sepsis",
  "source_of_infection",
  "baseline_anyvasopressor",
  "inhosp_mortality28",
  "baseline_neutropenia",
  "wbc_quartile"
)
# Continuous variables (everything in myVars not in catVars) will be
# summarized as mean (SD) by default, or median (IQR) — see Section 4
```

---

## 4. Table 1 — Overall cohort

```{r table1-overall}
table1 <- CreateTableOne(
  vars       = myVars,
  data       = df_analysis,
  factorVars = catVars
)

# Print with clean formatting
table1_print <- print(
  table1,
  quote       = FALSE,
  noSpaces    = TRUE,
  printToggle = FALSE,
  nonnormal   = c(          # list any skewed continuous vars here for median (IQR)
    "daysaccurate_timezero_firstanyantibiotics",
    "CHARLSON",
    "comagdelcfreedays14"
  )
)

knitr::kable(
  table1_print,
  caption = "Table 1. Baseline characteristics of the overall cohort"
)
```

---

## 5. Table 1 — Stratified by treatment group

```{r table1-stratified}
table1_trt <- CreateTableOne(
  vars       = myVars,
  data       = df_analysis,
  factorVars = catVars,
  strata     = "trt_group"
)

table1_trt_print <- print(
  table1_trt,
  quote       = FALSE,
  noSpaces    = TRUE,
  printToggle = FALSE,
  nonnormal   = c(
    "daysaccurate_timezero_firstanyantibiotics",
    "CHARLSON",
    "comagdelcfreedays14"
  ),
  smd = TRUE    # standardized mean differences — useful for Table 1 balance checking
)

knitr::kable(
  table1_trt_print,
  caption = "Table 1 (stratified). Baseline characteristics by treatment group"
)
```

---

## 6. Table 1 - Stratified by WBC Quartile


```{r table1-stratified-wbc-quartile}
table1_trt <- CreateTableOne(
  vars       = myVars,
  data       = df_analysis,
  factorVars = catVars,
  strata     = "wbc_quartile"
)

table1_quartile_print <- print(
  table1_trt,
  quote       = FALSE,
  noSpaces    = TRUE,
  printToggle = FALSE,
  nonnormal   = c(
    "daysaccurate_timezero_firstanyantibiotics",
    "CHARLSON",
    "comagdelcfreedays14"
  ),
  smd = TRUE    # standardized mean differences — useful for Table 1 balance checking
)

knitr::kable(
  table1_quartile_print,
  caption = "Table 1 (stratified). Baseline characteristics by WBC Quartile"
)
```

---

## 7. Save tables

```{r save-tables}
dir.create(here("output"), showWarnings = FALSE)

# Overall table
write.csv(
  table1_print,
  file = here("output", "table1_overall.csv")
)

# Stratified table
write.csv(
  table1_trt_print,
  file = here("output", "table1_stratified.csv")
)

#quartile table
write.csv(
  table1_quartile_print,
  file = here("output", "table1_quartile.csv")
)

cat("Tables saved to output/\n")
```

---

## 8. Session info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
